nasb.text: Then King Ahasuerus asked Queen Esther, “Who is he, and where is he, who would presume to do thus?”

esv.text: Then King Ahasuerus said to Queen Esther, “Who is he, and where is he, who has dared to do this?”

cnv.text: 亞哈隨魯王問王后以斯帖，說：“存心這樣行的人是誰？他在哪裡？”

ccb.text: 亚哈随鲁王问以斯帖王后：“谁敢这样做？他在哪里？”
